source_title: OSHRC Decision and Order, Secretary of Labor v. RK Hydro-Vac, Inc., Docket No. 03-1583
document_type: OSHRC administrative law judge Decision and Order (adjudicatory finding) affirming a serious citation
primary_pressure: Institutional/control failure (employer's inadequate remote-site supervision and absent enforcement policy = constructive knowledge) versus individual/operator fault (employee forgot to re-tie off; unpreventable employee misconduct).
notes: Winner (employer responsibility) rests on two causal-bridge findings (supervision gap and enforcement gap). Single-row removal weakens but does not flip; two-row removal would flip to the misconduct reading. Includes an off-axis penalty-mitigation row.
